# services.gokapi

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.gokapi`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.gokapi.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Lightweight selfhosted Firefox Send alternative without public upload. |
| `services.gokapi.environment` | `open submodule of attribute set of (string or signed integer)` | Environment variables to be set for the gokapi service. Can use systemd specifiers. For full list see <https://gokapi.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced.html#environment-variables>. |
| `services.gokapi.environment.GOKAPI_CONFIG_DIR` | `string` | Sets the directory for the config file. |
| `services.gokapi.environment.GOKAPI_CONFIG_FILE` | `string` | Sets the filename for the config file. |
| `services.gokapi.environment.GOKAPI_DATA_DIR` | `string` | Sets the directory for the data. |
| `services.gokapi.environment.GOKAPI_PORT` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Sets the port of the service. |
| `services.gokapi.mutableSettings` | `boolean` | Allow changes to the program config made by the program to persist between restarts. If disabled all required values must be set using nix, and all changes to config format over application updates must be resolved by user. |
| `services.gokapi.package` | `package` | The gokapi package to use. |
| `services.gokapi.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Configuration settings for the generated config json file. See <https://gokapi.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced.html#config-json> for more information |
| `services.gokapi.settingsFile` | `null or string` | Path to config file to parse and append to settings. Largely useful for loading secrets from a file not in the nix store. Can use systemd specifiers. See <https://gokapi.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced.html#config-json> for more information |
